subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Siyyid Muhammad ibn Vahid
subcodes.first_line: Lo! The portal of utterance is flung open, and the Youth of inner meaning is come. In His right hand, He beareth a chalice
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فتح باب البیان و ظهر غلام المعانی و کان فی یده الیمنی کاس من سلسبیل رحمه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
